About EVHEG

Hi, I'm Louis F..

Founder, EV Home Energy Guide

I'm a developer, digital creator, and a homeowner who—like many of you—realized early on that the "manual" for owning modern electric tech simply doesn't exist.

When I purchased my first home, I faced a steep learning curve with dozens of systems I didn't fully understand. When I added an EV to the mix, that complexity doubled. I spent months piecing together information about charging, energy rates, and home integration, realizing that while the technology was incredible, the practical instruction manual for the modern electric homeowner was missing.

I built this site to bridge that gap. My goal is to turn the complexity of the modern electric home into simple, actionable knowledge. Whether it's putting your EV's battery to work, saving on monthly utility bills, or just understanding how your home's energy ecosystem actually fits together, this is the resource I wish I'd had when I started—not just as a tech enthusiast, but as someone who cares about their home and family.

What you'll find here

  • EV Home Charging — Demystifying wall boxes, charging speeds, and rate optimization to keep your costs down.
  • Smart Energy — Taking control of smart panels and load management to make your home work for you, not against you.
  • Solar & Battery — Navigating the real-world utility of rooftop solar and whole-home backups.
  • Travel & Camping — Practical tips for V2L power, towing, and efficient route planning.
  • Tools & Workshop — Insights into the outdoor equipment and gear that keep your energy ecosystem running.

Ready to start? Browse our Calculators to run the numbers for your own home, or dive into our Featured Guides to begin mastering your energy ecosystem.

Browse Calculators Featured Guides
Important: EV Home Energy Guide is a platform for education and advocacy, operated by Vintage Allday LLC. All content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute professional, legal, or electrical advice. Always consult a licensed professional before making modifications to your home or electrical system.

Welcome to your command center for all things electric. We help you simplify the complex world of home energy by connecting your EV, solar, and battery storage into one efficient system.
